title: Automation to Detect and Delete Duplicates in a Specific Column
excerpt: "I would like to implement an automation that automatically detects duplicate items in a specific column and removes them, in order to avoid repeated entries and keep the database clean.

posts.author: Josue-cespedes (Josue Cespedes)
posts.cookedHtml: "I would like to implement an automation that automatically detects duplicate items in a specific column and removes them, in order to avoid repeated entries and keep the database clean.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
